title: search — broadcast channels
description: Two private channels. Per-user for sync-job lifecycle (own jobs). Per-tenant for admin dashboards watching cross-user reindex activity + engine health.

channels.name: user.{userId}.search
channels.description: Lifecycle stream for SearchSyncJobs where causer_id = userId. Powers the SPA's real-time reindex progress bar.
channels.authorize: User is the addressed user (auth()->id() === userId).

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.search
channels.description: Tenant-admin dashboard channel. Any user with search.indexes.viewAny may subscribe. Powers cross-user reindex activity + engine reachability + config-drift banners.
channels.authorize: User belongs to the tenant AND has `search.indexes.viewAny`.
